requirement_topic.en: Cell and Pack Safety — NC/IEC 62133 family alignment in import scrutiny
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯与电池组安全——NC/IEC 62133家族在入境审查中的应用
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯與電池組安全——NC/IEC 62133家族在入境審查中的應用

summary.en: For lithium battery cells and power banks entering Cameroon, the practical technical anchor is ANOR-adopted NC content based on IEC 62133-family principles for safety testing and construction requirements. In practice, customs and import inspection teams, plus project or client technical requirements, typically request evidence of safe design, battery chemistry classification, fire and thermal behavior, and test-document traceability. The exact edition and applicability are often tied to the product class and the regulated-product scope used in import control.
summary.zh: 对进入喀麦隆的锂电芯和移动电源，实务技术基准为ANOR采纳的NC内容，沿袭IEC 62133系列的安全测试和构造要求。实践中，海关及进口检验团队以及项目/业主技术要求通常会要求证明安全设计、化学体系分类、热和热失控行为、以及测试文件追溯。具体版本与适用性往往取决于产品类别及受监管范围。
summary.zht: 對進入喀麥隆的鋰電芯和行動電源，實務技術基準為ANOR採納之NC內容，沿襲IEC 62133系列的安全測試與構造要求。實務上，海關及進口檢驗團隊以及項目/業主技術要求通常會要求證明安全設計、化學體系分類、熱及熱失控行為及測試文件追溯。具體版本與適用性常取決於產品類別及受監管範圍。

standards_or_laws: ANOR-adopted NC requirements for lithium cells and battery packs aligned to IEC 62133 safety expectations
Import-control guidance for regulated electrical products requiring technical conformity evidence
Port inspection checklist requirements at Douala and Kribi for controlled product categories

summary.en: China uses GB 31241-2022 for portable sealed lithium cells and batteries and other relevant GB standards and testing routes. These are useful baselines but are not treated as automatic Cameroon conformity equivalents under import inspection. Exporters typically still need evidence mapped to the Cameroon-conforming import package and importer declaration process.
summary.zh: 中国对便携式锂电芯和电池采用GB 31241-2022及相关GB标准与检测路径，这些可作为技术基础，但在喀麦隆入境检验中并不自动等同。出口商通常仍需将证据映射到喀麦隆进口合规包和进口商声明流程。
summary.zht: 中國對便攜式鋰電芯與電池採用GB 31241-2022及相關GB標準與檢測路徑，這些可作技術基礎，但在喀麥隆入境檢驗中並不自動等同。出口商通常仍需將證據對應到喀麥隆進口合規包與進口商聲明流程。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022, GB 18287 or equivalent GB/T family for rechargeable lithium cells
CNCA/SAMR certification ecosystem including CCC where category-applicable

gap.en: The main gap is not merely test method but document routing: Cameroon expects import evidence accepted in its ANOR/NC and inspection context, while China exports typically provide domestic test files. To avoid mismatch, exporters should align test scope and model mapping to the exact Cameroon route and provide French-facing import documents through the in-country importer. The absence of a dedicated national battery-law framework in Cameroon means import inspectors evaluate compliance by product-pathway and product class, not EU battery-passport labels.
gap.zh: 主要差距不只在测试方法，而在文件路由：喀麦隆要求的进口证据必须在ANOR/NC和检验环境内可被接受，而中国出口常见的是国内测试档案。为避免错配，出口商应将测试范围和型号映射到喀麦隆实际通道，并通过在境内进口商提交法语文件。喀麦隆未设单独国家电池法框架，检验以产品路径与产品类别为核心，而非欧盟护照标签。
gap.zht: 主要差距不只在測試方法，而在文件路由：喀麥隆所需的進口證據必須在ANOR/NC及檢驗環境下可被接受，而中國出口常見的是國內測試檔案。為避免脫節，出口商應將測試範圍與型號映射到喀麥隆實際通道，並通過境內進口商提交法語文件。喀麥隆未設單獨國家電池法架構，檢驗以產品路徑和產品類別為核心，而非歐盟護照標籤。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for in-scope regulated lithium battery imports, with importer-facing technical conformity and inspection evidence required
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in Chinese domestic categories covered by law; not sufficient alone for Cameroon import gatekeeping

source.publisher: ANOR; Cameroon import conformity documentation practice

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Cameroon entry, ANOR/NC-style cell safety expectations are the practical gate; Chinese GB 31241-type reports are useful technical input but typically require repackaging into the Cameroon import-conformity chain led by the local importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 喀麦隆入场的实务关口是ANOR/NC风格的电芯安全要求。中国GB 31241类报告是重要技术输入，但通常仍需由本地进口商在喀麦隆进口合规链条内重新整理和提交。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 喀麥隆入場的實務關口是ANOR/NC型電芯安全要求。中國GB 31241類報告是重要技術輸入，但通常仍需由本地進口商在喀麥隆進口合規鏈條內重整並提交。
